hooks.command: if [ -n "$TMUX" ]; then CLAUDE_WINDOW="$(tmux display-message -p '#S:#I')"; IS_ACTIVE=$(tmux list-windows -a -F '#{session_name}:#{window_index} #{window_active}' 2>/dev/null | grep "^$CLAUDE_WINDOW 1$" || echo ""); if [ -z "$IS_ACTIVE" ]; then MSG="Claude Code needs your attention in $CLAUDE_WINDOW"; osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\""; fi; else MSG="Claude Code needs your attention"; osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\""; fi
